primary_promise: Discover the public world, then keep what matters in a private archive that belongs to you.

surfaces.role: public discovery with ordinary recommendation explanations and a direct private-archive route
person-owned local profile, archive, import, creation, recovery, mixed feed, and explicit public-social actions
read-only repository and Remote work projection

journey.gap: This is inspectable evidence, not part of the ordinary product promise.

offline_contract: The root promise, direct archive navigation, and recommendation explanations are static assets and require no shared mutation. Public actions remain explicitly server-backed and fail visibly when unavailable.

explanation_contract.eligibility: name the public source pool that admitted the item without reading private archive data
explanation_contract.score: show only exposed per-item values and otherwise describe the shipped score families without inventing numbers
explanation_contract.set_effects: separate saturation and diversity effects from per-item base score
explanation_contract.presence: state that eligibility, score, set effects, and bounded exploration selected the item without granting public authority

release_rule: The default journey contains only the public reader and direct person-owned archive path. Founder Room, Maker, protocol vocabulary, repository coordination, and debug surfaces remain outside the normal user path while staying separately inspectable.
